if(NOT DEFINED VENDOR_DIR)
	set(VENDOR_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
endif()

macro(CloneRepository REPO_NAME GIT_URL GIT_TAG)
	message(STATUS "Downloading ${REPO_NAME}...")
	FetchContent_Declare(
		${REPO_NAME}
		GIT_REPOSITORY ${GIT_URL}
		GIT_TAG ${GIT_TAG}
		#GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
	)
	FetchContent_MakeAvailable(${REPO_NAME})
endmacro()

set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_PROGRAMS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_EXTERNAL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(LIBRARY_SUFFIX "" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(LIBTYPE "STATIC" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(CMAKE_DEBUG_POSTFIX "" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(CMAKE_MINSIZEREL_POSTFIX "" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(CMAKE_RELWITHDEBINFO_POSTFIX "" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)


if(NOT DEFINED ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR)
	set(ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/../Engine")
endif()


# Vulkan
find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)
if (NOT Vulkan_FOUND)
	message(FATAL_ERROR "Could not find Vulkan package!")
else()
	message(STATUS "Using vulkan lib at: ${Vulkan_LIBRARIES}")
	cmake_path(GET Vulkan_LIBRARIES PARENT_PATH  Vulkan_LIB_DIR)
	
	if (CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Windows")
		set(Vulkan_SPIRV_CROSS_LIB "${Vulkan_LIB_DIR}/spirv-cross-core$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:d>.lib")
		set(Vulkan_SHADERC_LIB "${Vulkan_LIB_DIR}/shaderc_combined$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:d>.lib")
	elseif (CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")
		set(Vulkan_SPIRV_CROSS_LIB "${Vulkan_LIB_DIR}/libspirv-cross-core.a")
		set(Vulkan_SHADERC_LIB "shaderc_combined")
	endif()
endif()


include(FetchContent)

# gtest
set(BUILD_GMOCK OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(gtest_force_shared_crt ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
CloneRepository(gtest https://github.com/google/googletest.git beb552f)

# glm
CloneRepository(glm https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git 0.9.9.8)
set(GLM_INCLUDE_DIR ${glm_SOURCE_DIR})
install(
	DIRECTORY "${GLM_INCLUDE_DIR}/glm"
	DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}
)

# entt
CloneRepository(entt https://github.com/skypjack/entt.git v3.12.2)

# glad
# Generated by the glad online generator https://glad.dav1d.de/#profile=core&language=c&specification=gl&loader=on&api=gl%3D4.5 with core profile and gl 4.5
# CMakeLists.txt is my own
add_subdirectory(glad)

# glfw
set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_LIBRARY_TYPE "STATIC" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
CloneRepository(glfw https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git 2c1d310)

# bullet3
set(BULLET3_LIBS BulletDynamics BulletCollision LinearMath)
set(USE_GRAPHICAL_BENCHMARK OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_CPU_DEMOS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_OPENGL3_DEMOS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_BULLET2_DEMOS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_EXTRAS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(INSTALL_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_UNIT_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(INSTALL_CMAKE_FILES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_ENET OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_CLSOCKET OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(OpenGL_GL_PREFERENCE "GLVND")
CloneRepository(bullet3 https://github.com/bulletphysics/bullet3.git 3.25)
set(BULLET3_INCLUDE_DIR "${bullet3_SOURCE_DIR}/src")

# openal-soft
set(ALSOFT_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ALSOFT_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ALSOFT_UTILS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ALSOFT_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ALSOFT_INSTALL_CONFIG OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ALSOFT_INSTALL_HRTF_DATA OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ALSOFT_INSTALL_AMBDEC_PRESETS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(EXTRA_INSTALLS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
CloneRepository(openal-soft https://github.com/kcat/openal-soft.git 2ea092d6a)

# assimp
set(ASSIMP_INJECT_DEBUG_POSTFIX OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_SAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ASSIMP_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
CloneRepository(assimp https://github.com/assimp/assimp.git 3cf7d28bc)
if (CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    target_compile_options(assimp PRIVATE -Wno-deprecated-non-prototype)
endif ()

# filewatch
CloneRepository(filewatch https://github.com/ThomasMonkman/filewatch.git a59891b)
set(FILEWATCH_INCLUDE_DIR ${filewatch_SOURCE_DIR})

# fmt
CloneRepository(fmt https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt.git 10.1.1)

# Tracy
set(TRACY_STATIC OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(TRACY_ON_DEMAND ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
CloneRepository(Tracy https://github.com/wolfpld/tracy.git v0.10)

# libsndfile
CloneRepository(libsndfile https://github.com/libsndfile/libsndfile.git b2e547f70)

# stb_image
CloneRepository(stb_image https://github.com/nothings/stb.git 03f50e3)
set(STBI_INCLUDE_DIR "${stb_image_SOURCE_DIR}")
set(STBI_INCLUDE_DIR ${STBI_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
set(STBI_GENERATED_CPP "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/vendor/stb_image.generated.cpp")
file(WRITE ${STBI_GENERATED_CPP}
"#define STB_IMAGE_IMPLEMENTATION
#include \"stb_image.h\"")
add_library(stb_image STATIC ${STBI_GENERATED_CPP} "${STBI_INCLUDE_DIR}/stb_image.h")

target_include_directories(stb_image
	PUBLIC
		$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
		$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${STBI_INCLUDE_DIR}>
		$<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}>
)

target_compile_features(stb_image PRIVATE cxx_std_14)

set_target_properties(stb_image PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

# backwarden-cpp
CloneRepository(backward-cpp https://github.com/bombela/backward-cpp.git 65a769f)

if (CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    target_compile_options(backward INTERFACE -Wno-unqualified-std-cast-call)
endif ()

# imgui
CloneRepository(imgui https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git 83c4336)

add_library(imgui STATIC
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imconfig.h"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.h"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_internal.h"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imstb_rectpack.h"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imstb_textedit.h"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imstb_truetype.h"
		"${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_demo.cpp"
)

target_include_directories(imgui PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}>)

target_compile_features(imgui PRIVATE cxx_std_17)

set_target_properties(imgui PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

# yaml-cpp
set(YAML_CPP_INSTALL ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
CloneRepository(yaml-cpp https://github.com/jbeder/yaml-cpp.git 0.8.0)

set_target_properties(LinearMath PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
set_target_properties(BulletDynamics PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
set_target_properties(BulletCollision PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
set_target_properties(OpenAL PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
set_target_properties(sndfile PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
set_target_properties(fmt PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

if (NOT DEFINED VENDOR_NO_PARENT)
	set(ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR ${ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(GLM_INCLUDE_DIR ${GLM_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(FILEWATCH_INCLUDE_DIR ${FILEWATCH_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(OPENGL_LIB ${OPENGL_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIRS ${Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIRS} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(Vulkan_LIBRARIES ${Vulkan_LIBRARIES} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(Vulkan_LIB_DIR ${Vulkan_LIB_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(Vulkan_SPIRV_CROSS_LIB ${Vulkan_SPIRV_CROSS_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(Vulkan_SHADERC_LIB ${Vulkan_SHADERC_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(ASSIMP_LIB ${ASSIMP_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET3_INCLUDE_DIR ${BULLET3_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET3_LIBS ${BULLET3_LIBS} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(OpenGL_GL_PREFERENCE ${OpenGL_GL_PREFERENCE} PARENT_SCOPE)
endif()
